title: Murder Mystery 2: Elite Collector's Knowledge Quiz

questions.q: Which of these godly knives was originally obtainable from the Halloween 2015 event?
What is the exact value tier classification for the Chroma Darkbringer knife in the trading community?
On the Factory map, what strategic advantage does controlling the upper catwalk provide for the murderer?
a: Direct access to all spawn points
Multiple escape routes and aerial assassination angles

questions.q: Which season introduced the Ice set (Ice Dragon, Ice Shard, Ice Blaster)?
What is the most effective innocent strategy when the sheriff dies early and drops their gun?
a: Form groups near the gun spawn
Create distractions while one person retrieves the gun

questions.q: Which godly gun has the highest community-established trade value as of recent trading standards?
On the Workplace map, where is the most strategically advantageous position for a sheriff to patrol?
a: The upper office overlooking the central courtyard

questions.q: Which knife was the first ever Ancient rarity weapon introduced to MM2?
What advanced trading technique involves using multiple small items to work up to higher-tier godlies?
Which map feature on Office allows for the most unpredictable murderer movement patterns?
a: The interconnected cubicle maze with multiple floor levels
